name: Reitti
description: A location tracking and analysis application
compose:
name: slashnode-reitti
services:
  app:
    image: dedicatedcode/reitti:4.0.5
    container_name: reitti-app
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    depends_on:
      postgis:
        condition: service_started
        restart: true
      redis:
        condition: service_started
      tile-cache:
        condition: service_started
    environment:
      POSTGIS_USER: reitti
      POSTGIS_PASSWORD: reitti
      POSTGIS_DB: reittidb
      POSTGIS_HOST: reitti-postgis
    volumes:
      - app_data-app:/app/data
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:8744:8080
  postgis:
    image: imresamu/postgis:17-3.5-alpine
    container_name: reitti-postgis
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    environment:
      POSTGRES_USER: reitti
      POSTGRES_PASSWORD: reitti
      POSTGRES_DB: reittidb
    volumes:
      - postgis_data-postgis:/var/lib/postgresql/data
  redis:
    image: redis:7.4.9-alpine
    container_name: reitti-redis
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    volumes:
      - redis_data-redis:/data
  tile-cache:
    image: dedicatedcode/reitti-tile-cache:4.0.5
    container_name: reitti-tile-cache
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    volumes:
      - tile-cache_data-title-cache:/var/cache/nginx
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  app_data-app:
    name: slashnode-reitti_app_data-app
  postgis_data-postgis:
    name: slashnode-reitti_postgis_data-postgis
  redis_data-redis:
    name: slashnode-reitti_redis_data-redis
  tile-cache_data-title-cache:
    name: slashnode-reitti_tile-cache_data-title-cache
